---
title: "Stage 01 — Ambient RNA Removal (SoupX)"
subtitle: "iSN snRNA-seq Pipeline"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
knit: (function(input, ...) rmarkdown::render(input, output_dir = "SoupX_dir_out", ...))
params:
  project_root: "/scratch/rmlab/rmlab_shared3/tyron/Rscriptv2/iSN/iSN_claude"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.align = "center")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = params$project_root)
```

```{r libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
```

```{r load}
dirs <- c(
  file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/NR00_Day13_1Counts"),
  file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/NR00_Day13_1_dupCounts"),
  file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/NR00_Day13_2Counts"),
  file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/NR00_Day13_2_dupCounts"),
  file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/NR00_Day7_1Counts"),
  file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/NR00_Day7_2Counts"),
  file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/NR00_iPSC_1Counts"),
  file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/NR00_iPSC_2Counts")
)
cts <- Read10X(data.dir = dirs)
seu <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = cts)

desired_order <- c("NR00_Day13_1", "NR00_Day13_1_dup", "NR00_Day13_2", "NR00_Day13_2_dup",
                   "NR00_Day7_1", "NR00_Day7_2", "NR00_iPSC_1", "NR00_iPSC_2")
sample_mapping <- data.frame(orig_ident = as.character(1:8), sample_group = desired_order)
barcodes <- rownames(seu@meta.data)
meta <- seu@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::left_join(sample_mapping, by = c("orig.ident" = "orig_ident"))
rownames(meta) <- barcodes
seu <- AddMetaData(seu, metadata = meta["sample_group"])
seu <- NormalizeData(seu)
```

## Cell counts per sample

```{r cell-counts}
knitr::kable(as.data.frame(table(seu$sample_group)), col.names = c("Sample", "Cells"),
             caption = "Post-SoupX cell counts")
```

## UMI count distribution

```{r umi-dist, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
VlnPlot(seu, features = "nCount_RNA", group.by = "sample_group", pt.size = 0) +
  NoLegend() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## Gene count distribution

```{r gene-dist, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
VlnPlot(seu, features = "nFeature_RNA", group.by = "sample_group", pt.size = 0) +
  NoLegend() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## Marker gene expression (post-correction)

```{r markers, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
VlnPlot(seu,
        features = c("TUBB3", "PRPH", "SNAP25", "CALCA", "TRPV1",
                     "MRGPRD", "NTRK2", "NTRK3", "POU5F1", "SOX2", "NANOG"),
        group.by = "sample_group", pt.size = 0, ncol = 3) &
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## Contamination fraction (rho)

_Note: Contamination fraction (rho) values are not saved by the per-sample SoupX scripts. They are printed to console during execution. To inspect rho values, re-run the per-sample .R scripts in RStudio._

## Session info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
